subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God who supplicateth fervently! Thy letter was received. Previously, replies to thy letters were sent. The response to this [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله المبتهله نامه شما رسید از پیش بشما جواب مکاتیب ارسال شد جواب این
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @personal instructions
